feeds.name: Google News — Chicago mayor + housing
feeds.notes: Google News item links are news.google.com REDIRECTS a plain fetch can't read (JS interstitial -> empty extract). Gated off at poll time via config.discovery.google_news_enabled until a headless-fetch path (#30) can resolve the redirect; data kept so flipping the flag re-enables it.

feeds.name: Google News — 2027 Chicago mayoral race
feeds.notes: See the sibling google-news feed note: gated off via config.discovery.google_news_enabled (unreadable redirect links) until #30 lands.

feeds.name: Block Club Chicago
feeds.notes: WordPress site feed — verified live 2026-07-15: 200, 10 entries, both UAs, every attempt (the `/category/citywide/feed/` path 404/429'd — a bad URL, not an IP block). Server-rendered articles trafilatura reads directly; triage filters relevance per item.

feeds.name: WTTW News — Chicago politics
feeds.notes: Best-effort RSS URL; if the live discovery log shows `skip feed wttw-news`, replace with the confirmed feed path. Frequent candidate-forum coverage.

feeds.name: Chicago Reader
feeds.notes: WordPress site feed — verified live 2026-07-15: 200, 100 entries, both UAs, every attempt (the `/category/news-politics/feed/` path 404/429'd — a bad URL, not an IP block). High-volume site feed; triage filters per item (each new item is one cheap triage call until it's ledgered).

feeds.name: The TRiiBE
feeds.notes: WordPress site feed (server-rendered). Chicago civic/political coverage; triage filters relevance per item.

feeds.name: Chicago Sun-Times
feeds.notes: Best-effort feed URL (Sun-Times/WBEZ). If the live log shows `skip feed chicago-sun-times`, replace with the confirmed feed path. Strong City Hall coverage.

feeds.name: City Club of Chicago (YouTube)
feeds.notes: Channel_id hand-verified 2026-07-09. Posts candidate/official forum speeches — low volume, high relevance, so enabled.

feeds.name: WTTW / Chicago Tonight (YouTube)
feeds.notes: Channel_id hand-verified 2026-07-09. High-volume general news; triage filters by title but every new video costs a triage call. Enable after a per-source-type cap exists.

feeds.name: WGN News (YouTube)
feeds.notes: Channel_id hand-verified 2026-07-09. High-volume general news; enable after a per-source-type cap exists (see discovery-expansion-plan review-volume controls).

feeds.name: The Ben Joravsky Show
feeds.notes: RSS hand-verified 2026-07-09 (live, mp3 enclosures). Chicago-politics interview show. Enabled after the enclosure->downsample->transcribe->extract->review path was verified live 2026-07-09; each candidate episode is a full transcription (Groq cost).

feeds.name: The Fran Spielman Show
feeds.notes: RSS hand-verified 2026-07-09 (live, mp3 enclosures; PRX/dovetail 12963). Sun-Times weekly City Hall interview show — strong candidate coverage. Verified end-to-end live 2026-07-09 on the Matthew Brewer episode (7 statements, reviewer confirmed 5/7).

feeds.name: City Cast Chicago
feeds.notes: RSS hand-verified 2026-07-09 (live, mp3 enclosures). Daily Chicago local-news/politics show — higher episode volume than the interview shows, so watch its share of daily transcriptions. Enabled 2026-07-09 after the podcast path was verified live.
